title: geniostoma rupestre var. minor
intro: Geniostoma rupestre var. minor, also known as the small rocky Geniostoma, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Goodeniaceae. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, particularly in Fiji. Geniostoma rupestre var. minor has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism, with its leaves and stems being used in various herbal preparations. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in relieving pain and reducing the risk of infections.
